All Classes|All Packages|Serialized Form

C

Client - Class in model
Client este o clasa care reprezinta un client.
Client() - Constructor for class model.Client
Constructor implicit.
Client(int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.Client
Constructor care initializeaza un client cu toate atributele.
Client(String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.Client
Constructor care initializeaza un client fara ID.
client_name() - Method in record class model.Bill
Returns the value of the client_name record component.
ClientBLL - Class in bll
ClientBLL este clasa responsabila pentru logica de afaceri legata de entitatea Client.
ClientBLL() - Constructor for class bll.ClientBLL
 
ClientDAO - Class in dao
ClientDAO este clasa responsabila pentru operatiunile de acces la date specifice entitatii Client.
ClientDAO() - Constructor for class dao.ClientDAO
 
ClientPresentation - Class in presentation
ClientPresentation este clasa responsabila pentru interfata grafica de prezentare a clientilor.
ClientPresentation() - Constructor for class presentation.ClientPresentation
Constructorul implicit care initializeaza interfata grafica.
close(Connection) - Static method in class connection.ConnectionFactory
Inchide conexiunea specificata.
close(ResultSet) - Static method in class connection.ConnectionFactory
Inchide ResultSet-ul specificat.
close(Statement) - Static method in class connection.ConnectionFactory
Inchide statement-ul specificat.
connection - package connection
 
ConnectionFactory - Class in connection
ConnectionFactory este clasa responsabila pentru gestionarea conexiunilor cu baza de date.
